name: nameshort
description: nameshort lets you create personal command shortcuts so you can run long or complex commands instantly. Use /scm add +/command+ name to save a shortcut, then run it anytime with /sc name. Shortcuts support tab completion, are saved per player, and persist across restarts. Manage your shortcuts with /scm list, /scm edit, /scm delete, and /scm delete all. Create aliases for existing shortcuts with /scm alias, and remove them individually or along with everything pointing to the same command using /scm alias delete name related.
